acceptance_criteria: Approved-field paste proof on the live Orders document route on staging.

assertions.label: Approved-field rectangular paste is implemented and tested
assertions.expected: Approved spreadsheet blocks paste into editable Orders fields while locked-column overflow is rejected.
assertions.observed: OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid tests cover approved-field paste validation, locked-column overflow rejection, and blocked locked-column feedback.

assertions.label: Prior staging evidence already captured keyboard paste on the live route
assertions.expected: The live Orders route accepts a rectangular keyboard paste without relying on browser clipboard readback as the acceptance signal.
assertions.observed: Earlier G2 staging evidence recorded a keyboard paste path (`validPasteMethod: keyboard`) with the expected quantity values.

assertions.label: Browser clipboard readback remains environment-dependent
assertions.expected: Clipboard readback should not be required as the primary acceptance signal for paste support.
assertions.observed: Browser clipboard readback still varies by security policy, so the limitation is attached to the probe environment rather than the user-facing paste path itself.

limitation_detail.reason: The limitation is not that Orders cannot paste; it is that automation-layer clipboard readback is not a stable acceptance signal across environments.
limitation_detail.code_readiness: The paste path is implemented, validated, and covered by targeted unit tests.
limitation_detail.follow_up_needed: Keep live paste proof tied to user-visible grid results rather than to raw browser clipboard readback.
